query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guest_players,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 1 END) as guests_with_puzzles,
  SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles_by_guests
FROM players
WHERE userId IS NULL;

  SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles_by_guests
